question: In the logo visible during the intro and title cards, which word is positioned below the illustration of the person? A. Weekend B. Welder C. Ben McCall D. Subscribe
What is the episode number displayed on the title card with the black background?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and jeans stands behind a wooden workbench with tools. Text overlays identify the host as Ben McCall and the show as Weekend Welder. A person wearing a welding helmet and protective jacket welds a metal frame on a table while bright white light and sparks emit from the welding arc.

question: How many illustrations of a welder are visible?

Which of the previously seen people is back on screen? A. Person wearing a white protective welding suit and dark helmet B. Man with short brown hair wearing a light blue button-down shirt C. Person wearing a dark welding helmet and light-colored protective jacket D. Cartoon illustration of a person in a blue welding helmet

Did the video display BOTH the text 'Ben McCall' AND the text 'Getting Started'? A. Only 'Ben McCall' was displayed B. Only 'Getting Started' was displayed C. Both 'Ben McCall' and 'Getting Started' were displayed D. Neither was displayed
In the opening illustration, where is the text 'Weekend' located relative to the person wearing the welding helmet? A. To the left B. Above C. To the right D. At the bottom
Where is the red fire extinguisher positioned relative to the man standing at the workbench? A. To the left B. Above C. To the right D. At the bottom
What action is the person currently performing? A. standing B. welding C. simulating D. resting
Describe the sequence of visual elements and actions shown from the introduction to the welding process.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the Weekend Welder logo appears with orange sparks; at 2s, a man with a name graphic reading Ben McCall stands before a garage door; at 8s, a title card shows Episode 16 Garden Trellis; at 12s, a person in protective gear begins welding metal; at 16s, text overlays display Garden Trellis prominently.

question: Has the person wearing a dark welding helmet started welding the metal yet?

How has the person's appearance changed from the introduction to the welding segment? A. From a protective jacket and helmet to a light blue shirt B. From a light blue shirt to a protective jacket and helmet C. From a red shirt to a white shirt D. From a black shirt to a blue shirt
What protective gear does the man wear on his head before welding?
canonical_answer: The man puts on a black welding helmet.

question: Which action occurs immediately after the person welds the metal rod? A. Marking the metal rod with a black marker B. Bending a thin wooden rod C. Pointing at the metal rod tip D. Inserting the metal rod into the bench vise
